title: CachingStore simplification to Option<CachedEntry> is the right model
description: Removing HashMap + max_entries + eviction and replacing with Option<CachedEntry> is correct. Each CachingStore instance is bound to exactly one URI-identified secret, so multi-key caching was a design mismatch. The new model cannot be used incorrectly: there is only one slot and it holds the one secret the store wraps. A contributor might suggest adding multi-key support back — this should be rejected because the right abstraction is to create one CachingStore per secret, not one store per cache.
